data/maps/Route104_Prototype/text.inc.Route104_Prototype_Text_19AD9B: Oh? You look like a good TRAINER.\nWill you look at my POKéMON?
data/maps/Route104_Prototype/text.inc.Route104_Prototype_Text_19ADDA: I'm not good enough for you.
data/maps/Route104_Prototype/text.inc.Route104_Prototype_Text_19ADF7: I enjoyed our battle very much.\nPlease battle with me some other time.
data/maps/Route104_Prototype/text.inc.Route104_Prototype_Text_19AE6A: Did it surprise you that two POKéMON\nbattled at the same time?
data/maps/Route104_Prototype/text.inc.Route104_Prototype_Text_19AEA9: You can't battle with us if you have\nonly one POKéMON.\lWhy? Because we're strong!
data/maps/Route104_Prototype/text.inc.Route104_Prototype_Text_19AEFB: Hey, hey! This is my first battle in\na while. I'll give it my all!
data/maps/Route104_Prototype/text.inc.Route104_Prototype_Text_19AF3E: But I gave it my all...
data/maps/Route104_Prototype/text.inc.Route104_Prototype_Text_19AF56: You're far too strong!\nYou must be a great TRAINER!
data/maps/Route104_Prototype/text.inc.Route104_Prototype_Text_19AF8A: My POKéMON are extremely cute and\nextremely strong.\lPlease allow me to show you.
data/maps/Route104_Prototype/text.inc.Route104_Prototype_Text_19AFDB: I must concede defeat.\nAfter all, you are strong.
data/maps/Route104_Prototype/text.inc.Route104_Prototype_Text_19B00D: The next time we meet, I will have raised\nmy POKéMON much more.\pDon't expect mercy then!
data/maps/Route104_Prototype/text.inc.Route104_Prototype_Text_19B066: We HIKERS are always full of energy!\nMy POKéMON are also full of energy, too.\lWe're always itching for a battle!
data/maps/Route104_Prototype/text.inc.Route104_Prototype_Text_19B0EF: Wahahah! Sure, we lost!\nBut we had a great battle, didn't we?\lWe're satisfied with that!
data/maps/Route104_Prototype/text.inc.Route104_Prototype_Text_19B148: You look like a strong TRAINER,\nbut can you beat us?
data/maps/Route104_Prototype/text.inc.Route104_Prototype_Text_19B18D: If two POKéMON can battle at the same\ntime, all sorts of new things can happen.
data/maps/Route104_Prototype/text.inc.Route104_Prototype_Text_19B1DD: Do you only have one POKéMON that can\nbattle?\pThen we can't battle with you yet.
data/maps/Route104_Prototype/text.inc.Route104_Prototype_Text_19B22E: Have you tried beating all the other\nTRAINERS in battle?
data/maps/Route104_Prototype/text.inc.Route104_Prototype_Text_19B267: Thanks for coming today!\pI hope you're looking forward to this\ngame's release!
data/maps/Route104_Prototype/text.inc.Route104_Prototype_Text_19B2B6: Huh? Did you battle with all the\nTRAINERS already?
data/maps/Route104_Prototype/text.inc.Route104_Prototype_Text_19B2E9: Thank you for coming today!\pI hope you're looking forward to this\ngame's release!
data/maps/Route104_Prototype/text.inc.Route104_Prototype_Text_19B33B: I've never seen the POKéMON you have.\nIt makes me envious a little.
data/maps/Route104_Prototype/text.inc.Route104_Prototype_Text_19B37F: Look at all those TRAINERS!\nThey have different POKéMON, too.\lAnd they're all waiting for you!
data/maps/Route104_Prototype/text.inc.Route104_Prototype_Text_19B3DE: Welcome to the World of POKéMON!
data/maps/Route104_Prototype/text.inc.Route104_Prototype_Text_19B3FF: May all POKéMON battles be bright,\nfun, and ferocious!
